title: Milkah #4435
definition:
Milcah = "queen"

 1) daughter of Haran and wife of Nahor, her uncle and Abraham's
    brother, to whom she bore 8 children
 2) a daughter of Zelophehad and granddaughter of Manasseh
nasbUsage:
